known_for.title: Vermutungen über Herrn O.
known_for.overview: How manipulable are people? Mr. O. considers himself to be uninfluenceable. His daily routine with the corresponding decision-making situations and behaviors gives two commentators cause to take different positions on human dependence on external influences: While one wants to declare Mr. O. a will-less object of advertising, for example, the other believes his freedom is never at risk.

known_for.title: Ingos Interview oder Die Eitelkeit des Fernsehens
known_for.original_title: Ingos Interview oder Die Eitelkeit des Fernsehens

known_for.title: Hütet eure Töchter!
known_for.overview: A film consisting of seven episodes directed by young West German filmmakers, some of whom were signatories of the famous Oberhausen Manifesto. The film focuses on the sometimes highly dramatic fates of young girls.
